---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

**NOTE: This is a toy package created for expository purposes.**

# toypackage

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of `toypackage` is to provide convenience functions for some common tasks.

## Installation

You can install the development version of `toypackage` from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("abhicc/toypackage")
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

```{r example}
library(toypackage)
## basic example code
```
